info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Collection for the School Management REST API built with Node.js, Express, and MySQL.

**Base URL**: `http://localhost:3000` (change to your deployed URL as needed)

**Endpoints**
- `POST /addSchool` — Add a new school
- `GET  /listSchools` — List schools sorted by proximity

variable.description: Change to your deployed API URL

request.description: Verify the API is running and see available endpoints.
Adds a new school. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Intentionally missing address, latitude, longitude — returns 422 with validation errors.

response.name: 422 Validation Error

request.description: Latitude and longitude out of valid range — returns 422.
Returns all schools sorted by proximity to the given coordinates.

response.name: 200 OK — Sorted List

request.description: No query params provided — returns 422 validation error.

response.name: 422 Validation Error
